name: Dixie Peanut Brittle (Stove-top Method)
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Raw, Shelled Peanuts; Skin On
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, heat sugar, corn syrup, water, and salt until the mixture reaches a rolling boil.
2. Add peanuts to the boiling mixture. Reduce heat to medium and stir constantly.
3. Cook until the mixture spins a thread (293°F).
4. Add butter, then baking soda. Stir rapidly.
5. Pour the hot mixture onto a surface that has been coated with butter and spread it to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
6. Allow the brittle to cool completely before breaking into pieces.
